name: 2pc Steel Mackworth Rope Outdoor Patio Club Chairs Black - Threshold™: Weather-Resistant Steel Frame, Polyester Cushions
description:
Breathe new life into your outdoor seating area with these Mackworth 2-Pack Rope Motion Club Chairs from Threshold™. This outdoor furniture set includes two club chairs with off-white cushioned seats and backrests and a black rope-wrapped design on classic barrel silhouettes. Crafted with a powder-coated black finish, the steel chairs boast weather-resistant properties for continued outdoor use and are supported on slender sled bottoms, giving them a gorgeous appearance you and your guests are sure to enjoy.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
